name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.BraceForImpactHelper.SnapBonnet
summary: Exaggeration amount of the secondary (torso) impact with bonnet. +ve fold with car impact (as if pushed at hips by the impact normal).  -ve fold away from car impact.
remarks:
Default value = -7.0f.
            Min value = -20.0f.
            Max value = 20.0f.
